description.value:
**Benefit:** While using this style, you can make attacks with a dagger, punching dagger, scorpion whip, spiked gauntlet, or whip when using a flurry of blows or brawlerâs flurry. Only one of these attacks can be made with a whip or scorpion whip.

**Normal:** You can make a flurry of blows attack using unarmed strikes and monk weapons, and you can make a brawlerâs flurry attack using unarmed strikes, weapons from the close fighter weapon group, and monk weapons.
